name: Workers' Comp vs PI Lawsuit Forklift Accident Millcreek

mainEntity.name: Difference between workers' comp and personal injury lawsuit after forklift hit in Millcreek UT?
mainEntity.text: Difference between workers' comp and personal injury lawsuit after forklift hit in Millcreek UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers' comp: no-fault, covers medical/wages only, quick but capped. Personal injury: fault-based vs. third parties, unlimited damages (pain/suffering), longer process with attorney fees.

suggestedAnswer.text: Comp exclusive for employer but sue manufacturers for defective forks (e.g., Toyota models common in Millcreek). Combine claims: comp pays bills, PI adds millions if reckless training caused crush. Beware employer subrogation reducing your net.

description: Workers' comp: no-fault, covers medical/wages only, quick but capped. Personal injury: fault-based vs. third parties, unlimited damages (pain/suffering), longer
